title: Defend Against AI-Powered Phishing
modules: Module 1: Why AI Has Made Phishing Alarmingly Convincing
Module 2: Large Language Models as Phishing Engines — A Technical Look
Module 3: Spear Phishing, Whaling, and Voice Cloning Attacks in Practice
Module 4: Recognizing AI Phishing as an End User — Practical Detection Drills
Module 5: Technical Controls — Filters, DMARC, and Email Authentication Explained
Module 6: Organizational Defenses — Policies, Simulations, and Incident Response
Module 7: Staying Ahead as AI Phishing Continues to Evolve
synopsis: AI-generated phishing emails now pass grammar checks, mimic writing styles, and reference personal details scraped from public data — making the click rates on these attacks the highest security teams have ever seen. This course equips both everyday users and security professionals with detection instincts, defensive controls, and an organizational response framework built for the AI era.
rationale: Traditional phishing awareness training was designed for low-effort bulk attacks and leaves users and organizations dangerously underprepared for precision AI-crafted campaigns.
learning_outcome: Learners can recognize behavioral and contextual signals of AI-generated phishing, configure or advocate for relevant technical controls, and lead or participate in an effective incident response when an attack succeeds.
source_signals: How AI is Revolutionizing Mass Phishing Attacks and Escaping Detection
New Scams to Watch Out For in 2025
Cybersecurity 2025: Rising AI threats, new AI tools
